name: linear-todos
title: Linear Todos
description: Manage Linear todos with smart date parsing, driven by the linear-todos CLI.
author: avegancafe

commands.name: list
commands.title: List Todos
commands.subtitle: Linear Todos
commands.description: List your todos grouped by urgency, with actions to complete and snooze.

commands.name: create
commands.title: Create Todo
commands.subtitle: Linear Todos
commands.description: Create a new todo with priority and due date.

commands.name: remind
commands.title: Remind
commands.subtitle: Linear Todos
commands.description: Create a todo from natural language (e.g. "call mom by eod").

arguments.name: text
arguments.placeholder: call mom by end of day

commands.name: digest
commands.title: Morning Digest
commands.subtitle: Linear Todos
commands.description: Show today's and overdue todos with a greeting.

preferences.name: repoPath
preferences.title: Linear Todos Repo Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the linear-todos repository (where main.py lives).

preferences.name: uvPath
preferences.title: uv Executable Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the uv binary. Leave blank to auto-detect.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Linear API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Overrides ~/.config/linear-todos/config.json. Leave blank to use the CLI's existing config/env.

preferences.name: teamId
preferences.title: Default Team ID
preferences.description: Optional. Overrides the team ID from config.json.

preferences.name: stateId
preferences.title: Default State ID
preferences.description: Optional. Workflow state ID for new todos. Overrides config.json.

preferences.name: doneStateId
preferences.title: Done State ID
preferences.description: Optional. Workflow state ID used when completing todos. Overrides config.json.

preferences.name: timezone
preferences.title: Timezone
preferences.description: Optional. e.g. America/New_York. Overrides config.json for end-of-day calculations.
